tech_news.title: Capcom Spotlight set for March 5, featuring Mega Man: Dual Override, PRAGMATA, and more - Gematsu
tech_news.description: Capcom will host a Capcom Spotlight broadcast on March 5 at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET / June 27 at 7:00 JST, the company announced. You will be able to watch it on YouTube (English, Japanese).

tech_news.title: What Is That Mysterious Metallic Device US Chief Design Officer Joe Gebbia Is Using? - WIRED
tech_news.description: Gebbia was reportedly spotted at a San Francisco coffee shop using an unidentified pair of earbuds with a circular disc that looks similar to the device seen in a recent OpenAI hoax ad.

tech_news.title: A new app alerts you if someone nearby is wearing smart glasses - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: A hobbyist developer's new app, which can detect nearby smart glasses, comes amid resistance to always-on recording and listening devices that invade people's privacy.

tech_news.description: Apple announced iPhone 17e and M4 iPad Air today. Both devices include a C1X 5G modem, offering three unique advantages.
